Vali Jan

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
The Prince and the Petitioner
by Vali Jan
Safavid · Vali Jan · late 16th c.
A court drawing in ink and gold — a young prince seated on a rug, a humble man approaching with a petition. Vali Jan drew courtly manners with a faint ironic smile.
←Wales, James Wijnants, Jan→
